field.label: Enable LCDproc
field.help: Enable or disable the LCDproc service.

field.label: Log Level
field.help: Set the log level for LCDd daemon. Default is Warnings.

field.label: COM Port
field.help: Select the serial/USB/parallel port where your LCD display is connected.

field.label: Display Size
field.help: Select the display dimensions (columns x rows).

field.label: LCD Driver
field.help: Select the driver for your LCD display hardware.

field.label: Connection Type (HD44780)
field.help: Connection type for HD44780-compatible displays. Only applicable when HD44780 driver is selected.

field.label: Refresh Frequency
field.help: How often the LCD display content is refreshed.

field.label: Port Speed
field.help: Serial port baud rate. Use Default unless you have specific requirements.

field.label: Brightness
field.help: Display brightness when backlight is on. Not all drivers support this.

field.label: Off Brightness
field.help: Display brightness when backlight is off. Not all drivers support this.

field.label: Contrast
field.help: Display contrast level. Not all drivers support this.

field.label: Output LEDs
field.help: Enable status LEDs output (CFontzPacket displays only). LEDs indicate CARP and gateway status.

field.label: Control Menu
field.help: Enable the built-in LCDd server menu (navigate via display buttons).

field.label: Matrix Orbital Type
field.help: Matrix Orbital display type. Only applicable for MtxOrb driver.

field.label: Matrix Orbital Adjustable Backlight
field.help: Enable adjustable backlight for Matrix Orbital displays that support it.

field.label: Matrix Orbital Backlight Color
field.help: Backlight color for Matrix Orbital displays with RGB LED backlighting.
